text: A dimly lit and slightly disorienting space surrounds me. The quiet magnifies the hum of electricity and the echo of my own thoughts. I am struck by the cold rationality of glass and concrete, and an undercurrent of anticipation runs through me—a sense of waiting, or perhaps searching, for meaning within these sterile halls. I feel both isolated and curious, aware of my own smallness amidst this structured, impersonal environment.
